name: Pacific Architects and Engineers Incorporated (PAE)
description: PAE Incorporated, formerly known as Pacific Architects and Engineers, was a prominent American defense and government services contractor founded in 1955. The company specialized in providing essential operational solutions, logistics, and outsourced support services to the United States government, allied nations, international organizations, and commercial enterprises globally. PAE operated across all seven continents, delivering mission-critical support for complex programs. In 2022, the company was acquired by Amentum, a global leader in engineering and project management, effectively integrating PAE's extensive service capabilities into Amentum's broader portfolio of government and commercial solutions.
